case_title: DELCI MORO VS. JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MORO, DELCI JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF DELCI MORO APPEARED. DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY TRUONG, MEMBER/OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,317.97 FILED BY MORO, DELCI AS TO DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $220.34 RE 35506 FOR TRANSACTION W0518815D014 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO DELCI MORO, DOC #1909345077, WARRANT #38205452, DATED OCT-01-2018
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORO, DELCI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JT'S AUTO REPAIR LLC $218.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $218.66, ALTERNATOR BRACKET REPAIR DAMAGES ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
